====Pokémon====
These are the Pokémon that Candice is known to have:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|width=85
|pkmn=Regice
|type1=Ice
|img=Candice Regice DPA.png
|epnum=DPA14
|epname=A Novel Test!!
|desc={{p|Regice}} was used by Candice to test Hareta's ability to capture {{TP|Hareta|Regigigas}}. It is her only known Pokémon that is her specialty type. Regice was also used along with the other giants to awaken Regigigas.

Regice's only known move is {{m|Ice Beam}}, and its Ability is {{a|Clear Body}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Regirock
|type1=Rock
|img=Candice Regirock DPA.png
|epnum=DPA14
|epname=A Novel Test!!
|desc={{p|Regirock}} was used by Candice to test Hareta's ability to capture Regigigas. Regirock was also used along with the other giants to awaken Regigigas.

Regirock's known moves are {{m|Hammer Arm}} and {{m|Dig}}, and its Ability is {{a|Clear Body}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Registeel
|type1=Steel
|img=Candice Registeel DPA.png
|epnum=DPA14
|epname=A Novel Test!!
|desc= {{p|Registeel}} was the only one of Candice's giants not used in her battle against Hareta. It was later used along with the other giants to awaken Regigigas.

None of Registeel's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Clear Body}}.}}
